workingFeatures: System Design space visible in list
Space viewer loads: 12 story point links
Results page has all 3 tabs: Overall, Spaces, Exams

issues.title: SpaceViewerPage crashes: "Rendered more hooks than during the previous render"
issues.detail: Both System Design spaces crash. All space content blocked. ID1=PDFq1OluyAGNAz6Fpx0j:true, ID2=8rPWlVP4kyDp1xd75SnH:true
issues.rootCause: SpaceViewerPage.tsx:103 — `const [celebrationShown, setCelebrationShown] = useState(false)` is called AFTER conditional early-returns at lines 63-98 (loading/error/null states). This violates React Rules of Hooks.
issues.fix: Move `const [celebrationShown, setCelebrationShown] = useState(false)` from line 103 to BEFORE line 63 (before any conditional returns). One-line move.

issues.title: Story Point Viewer renders without content (known EVAL-C1-002)
issues.detail: Test 11 timed out: story point viewer navigated successfully but content items did not load. Consistent with evaluation report EVAL-C1-002 — useStoryPointItems hook silently fails.
issues.rootCause: useSpaceItems.ts:13-22 — getDocs() has no try-catch. StoryPointViewerPage.tsx:59 does not destructure {error, isError}. Silent Firestore failures → empty displayItems.
issues.fix: Wrap getDocs() in try-catch. Add error state rendering in StoryPointViewerPage. Verify Firestore composite indexes for story point items query.

issues.title: Breadcrumb "Spaces" link not detected on space viewer
issues.detail: Selector `a:has-text("Spaces")` returned false on space viewer page. May be styled differently or not yet rendered at check time.
issues.rootCause: Possible rendering delay or breadcrumb uses different text/structure
issues.fix: Check breadcrumb component implementation; ensure it renders before waitForTimeout expires

contentAssessment.storyPointsFoundNote: Story points found in Behavioral space (fallback), NOT System Design. System Design spaces crash before showing content.

observationNotes: System Design spaces (PDFq1OluyAGNAz6Fpx0j and 8rPWlVP4kyDp1xd75SnH) both crash with React hook order violation
Behavioral, LLD, DSA spaces work correctly - 12 story point links found in Behavioral space
Login works with SUB001/email credentials but Firebase rate-limits after ~3-4 rapid login attempts in testing
"Try Again" in error boundary for space viewer appears to recover (passes test) but likely re-crashes on data load
Practice mode (Behavioral Interview quiz) works: questions load, options clickable, "Unlimited retries" shown
Timed test landing (Behavioral Timed Assessment) works: Duration/Max Attempts shown, Start Test button visible
Results page (/results) loads correctly: "My Progress" h1, 3 tabs (Overall/Spaces/Exams), all 5 spaces shown in analytics
Dashboard (/) loads correctly with stat cards

cycleConclusion.primaryBlocker: SPACE-P0-01: SpaceViewerPage crashes for all System Design spaces. One-line fix in SpaceViewerPage.tsx moves useState() above conditional returns.
cycleConclusion.secondaryBlocker: STORY-POINT-P0-01: Story point viewer silently fails to load content (existing EVAL-C1-002 bug).
cycleConclusion.whatWorks: Login, spaces list, other spaces (Behavioral/LLD/DSA), practice mode, timed test landing, results page, tests page, dashboard.
cycleConclusion.note: The System Design learning path is completely blocked by the space viewer crash. Students cannot access any System Design story points, quizzes, or assessments from that space. The fix is simple (one-line move) and must be the first fix in Cycle 2.
